mechanism_summary: I2S surfaces the ELF magic keeping the memcmp guard satisfied, while the EI_DATA byte lands outside both valid case labels; cmplog builds the combined state that naive's blind havoc rarely achieves.
one_line: I2S maintains ELF magic while EI_DATA byte escapes known case labels

mechanism_summary: cmplog intercepts strcmp/memcmp comparing the header name against 'Content-Type' and records both operands; I2SRandReplace substitutes the constant operand into the input at matching offsets, planting the literal that naive's blind havoc must hit by chance.
one_line: I2S substitutes 'Content-Type:' literal to satisfy POST header gate

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the as_signed<0 comparison and upstream format/parameter CMPs from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes operand bytes so the input constructs a negative-valued %d conversion; naive lacks CMP introspection and only stumbles onto a negative value by chance.
one_line: I2S constructs negative %d argument value via CMP operand substitution

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads intercepted CMP operands from the post-execution buffer and substitutes the parser-routing bytes (tag/colon/path/numeric fields) that produce a negative decimal integer, satisfying the is_neg || sign-flag guard that naive reaches only 1/10 trials.
one_line: I2S substitutes parser-routing bytes to produce negative integer sign guard

mechanism_summary: cmplog intercepts the switch comparison against integer 4 via trace_cmp and I2SRandReplace writes the format constant into the format-field offset; naive never reliably lands the 16-bit value 4 at the right offset by havoc alone.
one_line: I2S writes format==4 constant to ClassDef switch to hit case 4

mechanism_summary: cmplog I2SRandReplace reads the 'MATH' FOURCC and Device format constants from CMP operands and substitutes them into the input, landing the format in {1,2,3} to take the recognized case arm; naive must blindly hit a small magic integer at the right offset.
one_line: I2S places MATH tag and format {1,2,3} to reach Device case arm

mechanism_summary: cmplog I2SRandReplace reads the GPOS/GSUB table-tag and 'dflt' script-tag CMP operands and substitutes them into the input, building the ScriptList structure that find_script_index(HB_OT_TAG_DEFAULT_LANGUAGE) can match; naive havoc cannot assemble the multi-byte literals.
one_line: I2S assembles GPOS/GSUB table and dflt script tag for find_lang_sys match
